meta.title: NPC Test - RPG Dialogue Tree | DopaBrain
meta.description: Are you an NPC or the Main Character? React to 10 RPG encounters and discover your role — from NPC to Final Boss!

intro.title: NPC Test
intro.subtitle: Discover Your RPG Role Through Dialogue

s1.line: Traveler, darkness has fallen upon this village. Only the brave can break this curse. What kind of person are you?

reactions.a: ...Another background NPC. Move aside, the hero will come eventually.
reactions.b: Interesting look in your eyes. I see potential.
reactions.c: Ha! Such confidence! With eyes like those, perhaps...

s2.line: Adventurer! The kingdom is in peril. A dragon has kidnapped the princess. What will you do?

choices.c: I'll leave right now, Your Majesty!

reactions.a: ...Indeed. Guard! Send in the next adventurer.
reactions.b: A practical one. 1000 gold coins and a knighthood.
reactions.c: That's the spirit! The kingdom's fate rests on your shoulders!

s3.line: Heh heh heh... You who entered this cursed castle. You must solve my riddle to leave alive. Ready?

choices.b: I love riddles. Bring it on.
choices.c: Riddles? I'll be the one asking. Your turn!

reactions.a: Boring... The door is locked anyway. You can't leave.
reactions.b: Good... Not bad. I see light in your eyes.
reactions.c: What?! You dare reverse-riddle a ghost?! ...I like you.

s4.line: This weapon took 30 years to forge. I'll only give it to someone truly worthy. Prove yourself.

choices.a: I don't really think I'm worthy...
choices.b: I'll take any test you give me.
choices.c: I think this blade already chose me.

reactions.a: ...Leave. The blade awaits its true master.
reactions.b: Humility and willpower. A fine combination.
reactions.c: Haha! With guts like that, even the blade would agree!

s5.line: Meow~ Human, pick one at this fork. Left is safe but boring. Right is dangerous but has treasure.

choices.c: Obviously right! Hand over the treasure!

reactions.a: A safe choice, meow... But adventurer material? Doubtful, meow.
reactions.b: A cautious human, meow. Not bad, meow.
reactions.c: Nyaha! A brave one, meow! Such a fool... er, hero! It's been a while, meow!

s6.line: System error... This facility's defense system has gone haywire. You have 30 seconds. Manual override or hack the mainframe?

choices.c: Hack the mainframe. Show me the code!

reactions.a: Confirmed. User clearance: Observer. Please stand by.
reactions.b: Manual mode activated. You are a systematic problem-solver.
reactions.c: Warning: Unauthorized access— ...Access granted?! Impressive, human.

s7.line: The flowers are wilting and the forest is dying... I can grant one wish. What would you wish for?

choices.b: Use it to revive the forest.
choices.c: I have a way to solve three problems with one wish!

reactions.a: ...Not being able to decide is the saddest thing.
reactions.b: What a warm heart. The forest will be grateful.
reactions.c: Oh my! What an idea! You truly are special!

s8.line: Heh heh... You made it this far. Impressive. But the Dark Lord wants to negotiate. Don't you want an easy life? Join us.

choices.a: Easy life? That doesn't sound bad...
choices.b: Let me hear the terms first.
choices.c: Tell the Dark Lord I'm coming for him!

reactions.a: Good, good~ The Dark Lord loves obedient sheep. Heh heh.
reactions.b: Clever. But those who weigh both sides end up enemies to all.
reactions.c: What?! This maniac... I need to report this. My Lord, we have a problem!

s9.line: I once saved the world. But I'm old now. It's time to pass the torch. Are you ready to be my successor?

choices.a: I don't think I'm cut out for this...
choices.b: I'm not sure yet, but I want to learn.
choices.c: I've been waiting for this, Master!

reactions.a: Humility is a virtue, but too much and you miss your chance. Go.
reactions.b: Good. The willingness to learn — that's where it all begins.
reactions.c: Ha! Those eyes... Like looking at my younger self. You pass!

s10.line: This is the last gate. Your destiny waits beyond. But there's no turning back. Will you still open it?

choices.a: Let me think and come back...
choices.c: A gate can stop me? Move aside!

reactions.a: The gate doesn't wait... This is as far as you go.
reactions.b: Good. Calm resolve... You are worthy of facing your destiny.
reactions.c: Hahaha! One who fears no gate! You are... the legend!

npc.name: Full NPC
npc.tagline: Walks into walls. Repeats the same dialogue.
npc.desc: Every NPC just passed you by. You always picked the safest dialogue option. Your default line is '...' and you don't get involved in the main quest. But don't worry — every world needs NPCs. Without you, the village would be empty!

extra.name: Background Extra
extra.tagline: Present in the scene, but nobody remembers the name.
extra.desc: You exist in the scene, but NPCs don't remember you for long. Villager #47 — technically present, technically alive... technically there. You have character growth potential, but you're still on the loading screen.

side.name: Side Character
side.desc: NPCs remember you! You made impressive choices in several situations and showed real presence. Not the main quest protagonist yet, but the side character everyone loves. Your backstory episode is coming!

main.name: Main Character
main.desc: NPCs were deeply impressed! Plot armor activated — every conversation shifted when you entered. Character development arc, an OST, and at least three NPCs rooting for you.

boss.name: Final Boss
boss.tagline: Doesn't play the game. IS the game.
boss.desc: NPCs trembled before you! You dominated every conversation, and reality bent around your decisions. Multiple phases, a killer theme song, and every NPC knows your name. Legendary!

share.title: Share Your Result
share.text: I got "{type}" ({score}%) on the NPC Test! Take the RPG dialogue quiz:
